analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet merely announces a message from President Vladimir Putin to Sri Lankan President Gotabaya Rajapaksa, tagging related accounts and media. It contains no content of the message, no value judgments, and no descriptive framing. Evaluation by narrative: RU1 (West immoral/hostile): Not present—no mention of the West or hostility. RU2 (Russia leads alternative system): Not present—no reference to multipolarity, sovereignty, or non-Western cooperation beyond a neutral heads-of-state communication. RU3 (Russia is a benevolent partner): While a diplomatic message could imply partnership, the tweet provides no claim of assistance, peacebuilding, or reliability; therefore insufficient evidence. RU4 (Russian history admirable): Not present. RU5 (Russia at the forefront): Not present. RU6 (Russian culture/nature/heritage): Not present. Conclusion: No listed narrative is promoted.
